title: larrea watsonii
intro: Larrea watsonii, also known as Creosote bush, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Zygophyllaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Larrea watsonii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
